description: All metrics exposed by slurm_exporter — reference dashboard for admins/users to copy panels into their own dashboards. GPU panels included (show 0 if no GPUs).

links.title: slurm_exporter on GitHub
links.tooltip: View source, docs and dashboards on GitHub

panels.title: slurm_nodes_* — All node states over time
slurm_node_status — Node up status per node/partition
── Global Job Totals (slurm_jobs_*) — always present even at 0 ──
slurm_jobs_* — All global job states over time
slurm_user_fairshare_raw_usage_cpu_seconds — CPU-seconds per user
panels.description: Decay-weighted historical CPU usage in seconds.

panels.title: slurm_account_fairshare_norm_shares / norm_usage — Account shares vs usage
slurm_rpc_stats — RPC call count per operation (top 15)
slurm_rpc_stats_avg_time — RPC avg time per operation (top 15, µs)
slurm_license_total/used/free/reserved — License usage
panels.description: Only emitted when Slurm licenses are configured.

title: Slurm - All Metrics Reference
